caption.full:
Tom Cruise and Jerry Bruckheimer are attached to a Days of Thunder.

A new take on the 1990 racing film is reportedly moving closer to production. Sundance award winner Jonathan Levine is in talks to direct the project. The original film grossed $158 million worldwide.

Do you want this reboot to hit the track, or should it stay parked forever?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#MovieNews #BoxOffice #DaysOfThunder #TomCruise
caption.firstComment: A 'Days of Thunder' reboot only works if they let Cruise push the limits himself — anything less is just track noise.

facebook.text: Tom Cruise is reportedly attached to a reboot of his 1990 racing film, 'Days of Thunder.' Producer Jerry Bruckheimer is also on board, with Jonathan Levine in talks to direct. The original film grossed $158 million worldwide. What do you think of this reboot? Let us know in the comments!
